rulings.Case Title: PHILLIP GARCIA VS. CARRIE WILSON, IN HER CAPACITCY AS TRUSTEE OF THE et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 17, 2015, line 2. DEFENDANT CARRIE WILSON and ANGELO WILSON's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is overruled as to the 2nd and 5th causes of action. Common law and constitutional invasion of privacy are sufficiently alleged. Demurrer is overruled as to the 7th cause of action for enforcement of debt. Res judicata is not applicable under the facts of this case. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the 3rd and 4th causes of action. There is no private right of action under Penal Code 647 and moving defendant is not alleged to be the perpetrator per CCP 632/637.2. Plaintiff's request for leave to amend to allege a new cause of action under CC 1708.8 is denied without prejudice as not properly before the Court on this motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PETER M OWENS VS. IRIS CANADA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With Deposition Subpoena, Request For Sanctions, And Finding Of Contempt
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 17, 2015, line 4. PLAINTIFFs PETER OWENS, CAROLYN RADISCH and STEPHEN OWENS' Motion To Compel Compliance With Deposition Subpoena, Request For Sanctions, And Finding Of Contempt GRANTED, no opposition filed. Iris Merriouns shall appear for deposition. Sanctions granted in the amount of $2,255 to be paid within 30 days of notice of entry of order. Additionally, Iris Merriouns is ordered to show cause why she should not be held in contempt of Court for failure to comply with the Court's order. OSC is set for November 13, 2015 and Iris Merriouns' response shall be filed no later than November 6, 2015. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: A-1 PROPERTY MANAGEMENT & INVESTMENTS VS. STEVEN PAUL HIGUERET ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 17, 2015, line 6. DEFENDANTs STEVEN HIGUERET and LYNNE FEURER-HIGUERET's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend to reconcile the allegations in the complaint and attachments re: lables. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Cause of action for unlawful detainer based on tenant's notice of termination of tenancy is sufficiently alleged. = (501/REQ)
